journal.name: New York University Journal of Law & Business

registry_refs.key: New York University Journal of Law & Business

publication_scope.notes: The requested seed is the JLB Online HTML publication, not a print-volume PDF archive.

evidence.notes: General user-agent is allowed; only lightbox query routes are disallowed.
Server-rendered Wix list exposes eight current post cards with title, author, relative/display date, and /single-post/ links.
Publication sitemap contains 133 /single-post/ URLs and is the deterministic inventory route.
Article page exposes h1 title, data-hook user-name author, and full HTML body in data-hook post-description. Observed PDF URLs are external citations, not article downloads.

reconnaissance.notes: JLB Online is an HTML-first Wix publication. The sampled post has no journal-owned article PDF, volume, or issue; outbound cited PDFs must never be collected as holdings.

include: JLB Online posts listed in blog-posts-sitemap.xml
HTML post metadata and body text
exclude: Print journal issues unless a separate archive is located
scope.notes: Treat this as a metadata/HTML supplement source, not evidence of print PDF coverage.

entry_points.notes: Preferred deterministic inventory; archive UI is only a current-page corroboration.

archive_patterns.notes: Some older slugs retain date components after /single-post/.

pagination.termination: Only eight current server-rendered cards were inspected; use the 133-URL sitemap instead of UI pagination.
pagination.notes: No UI next control was needed for deterministic discovery.

layout_eras.label: Wix JLB Online posts
layout_eras.notes: Only newest page layout sampled; start year inferred from oldest visible sitemap slug and requires verification.

sources.example: Structured Deferral: The Promises and Limits of Liability Management Exercises

abstract.missingness: No distinct abstract observed; the page exposes the full HTML essay body.
abstract.notes: Do not mislabel the opening paragraph as an abstract.

sources.notes: Resolve relative dates against fetch date; older cards display month/day.

year.missingness: Not visibly isolated in sampled article DOM selectors; archive card supplies date context.

normalization: Resolve relative date to ISO when unambiguous
date.missingness: Present on archive cards, not confirmed on sampled article selector.

volume.missingness: JLB Online post route does not expose print volume.

issue.missingness: JLB Online post route does not expose print issue.

pages.missingness: HTML posts have no print page range.

validation.notes: No journal-owned file route exists in the sampled post. External cited PDFs were deliberately not downloaded.

robots.notes: General Allow: /; avoid lightbox query paths.

access.politeness_notes: Robots first; one archive, one sitemap, and one article request only; no files downloaded.

verdict.summary: The Wix sitemap gives a deterministic 133-post inventory and sampled pages expose clean title, author, date context, and full HTML, but this JLB Online route has no journal-owned article PDFs, volumes, or issues.
blockers: Requested seed is an HTML supplement rather than a print PDF archive
Only one post page was sampled
verdict.next_action: Keep JLB Online in a metadata-only Wix lane and separately locate the print Journal of Law & Business volume archive before PDF acquisition.
verdict.implementation_notes: Enumerate blog-posts-sitemap.xml, parse /single-post/ pages, collect HTML body separately, and reject outbound PDF citations as non-holdings.
